statement: In every magma, Equation 1725 (`x = (y * y) * ((x * z) * y)`) implies Equation 2635 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * w)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0124
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op x z) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) w)) z)
